campaign: MarbMarket — The First veDEX on MegaETH is Launching
mission: Explain the veDEX Model & Why MarbMarket Matters
best_content:
Most people chase yield farming. The real game is voting power.

MarbMarket's launching the first veDEX on MegaETH — and it's changing how we think about incentives.

Here's how it works: lock MARB → get veTokens → vote weekly on which LP pools get emissions. Projects pay bribes for those votes.

Your lock duration = your influence. Longer locks = more voting power + more rewards.

This creates a flywheel: MARB lockers direct emissions → LPs get rewards → protocols pay bribes → incentives flow back to lockers.

No presale. No VCs. Just fair launch governance.

First veDEX on MegaETH that puts community in control of capital flows.

x.com/Marb_market

@RallyOnChain What's your take on the ve(3,3) model?
qa_comments: This is such a clever approach to incentives! Putting the community in control through voting power could really change the DeFi landscape.
The ve(3,3) model is brilliant here - longer locks for more influence create that perfect alignment between protocol health and user rewards.
Excited to see how this plays out on MegaETH! The flywheel effect where bribes flow back to lockers is a game-changer.
